description: Mobile and Touch Enhancements (items 21-30): Swipe between tabs, pull-to-refresh, haptic feedback simulation, long-press context menus, swipe-to-favorite, pinch-to-zoom artwork, landscape player mode, bottom sheet for track details, floating action button, and thumb-zone optimized layout.
steps: 1. Create app/components/ui/SwipeTabs.tsx: a wrapper component that detects horizontal swipe gestures (touchstart/touchmove/touchend) and emits tab change events. Use in favorites page tabs and other tabbed interfaces.

2. Create app/components/ui/PullToRefresh.tsx: detect pull-down gesture on mobile. Show a spinner animation at top. Call router.refresh() or window.location.reload() on release. Add to main content areas.

3. Create app/components/ui/HapticButton.tsx: a button wrapper that adds subtle CSS scale/transform animation on tap (scale down then back) to simulate haptic feedback. Apply to key interactive elements.

4. Enhance app/components/ui/ContextMenu.tsx: add long-press detection (touchstart with 500ms timeout). Show quick actions: favorite, add to queue, share, go to artist. Apply to TrackCard and AlbumCard components.

5. Create app/components/ui/SwipeToFavorite.tsx: wrap track cards with horizontal swipe detection. Swipe right reveals heart icon and favorites the track. Show visual feedback with green background reveal.
6. Create app/components/ui/PinchZoomImage.tsx: full-screen modal for album artwork with pinch-to-zoom on mobile using touch events for scale/translate transforms.

7. Create app/components/player/LandscapePlayer.tsx: detect landscape orientation via matchMedia('(orientation: landscape)') and show an immersive fullscreen player with large artwork, controls spread across width.
8. Enhance app/components/ui/BottomSheet.tsx: make it work as a slide-up sheet triggered by tapping a track card on mobile. Include preview player, lyrics snippet, favorite/queue actions.
9. Create app/components/ui/FloatingActionButton.tsx: a FAB fixed to bottom-right (above bottom nav on mobile) with quick access to search and play actions. Expands on tap to show mini menu.
10. Update layout and component spacing: ensure all primary action buttons (play, favorite, search) are in the bottom 40% of the screen on mobile. Adjust MobileBottomNav, MiniPlayer positioning.
acceptance_criteria: Horizontal swipe navigates between tabs on favorites page
Pull-down gesture triggers refresh animation on mobile
Buttons have subtle scale animation on tap simulating haptics
Long-press on track/album cards shows context menu with actions
Swiping right on a track card favorites it with visual feedback
Album artwork can be viewed fullscreen with pinch-to-zoom
Landscape orientation shows immersive fullscreen player
Tapping a track shows a bottom sheet with details and actions
FAB provides quick access to search/play on mobile
Primary actions are accessible in bottom 40% of screen on mobile
verification: bun run lint passes with zero errors
bun run build succeeds with zero errors
findings: All 10 mobile and touch features implemented successfully. Build and lint pass with zero errors. Key patterns: (1) LandscapePlayer uses useSyncExternalStore for matchMedia to avoid setState-in-effect lint errors, (2) PinchZoomImage resets zoom state in handleClose callback rather than in an effect, (3) ContextMenu enhanced with LongPressWrapper that uses touchstart with 500ms setTimeout for long-press detection, (4) SwipeTabs integrated into favorites page wrapping tab panels for horizontal swipe navigation, (5) MiniPlayer repositioned to bottom-[72px] on mobile (above bottom nav) for thumb-zone optimization, (6) FloatingActionButton and LandscapePlayer added to root layout for global availability, (7) MobileBottomNav updated with larger touch targets (48px min), safe-area-bottom class, and active:scale-90 for haptic feel.
